verdict_rationale: PulseGuard demonstrates production-pattern governance discipline and calibration-first methodology. Core weaknesses are data realism (Taiwan Default: 2005 vintage, no income, random split, 30k rows), decision economics (illustrative cost matrix only), and evaluation validity (random not temporal split; uncalibrated LightGBM comparison). These gaps prevent Gold certification. Foundations are solid; adding Home Credit realism lane and temporal validation would push score to GOLD_CANDIDATE.
taiwan_realism_rationale: Taiwan Default is a verified real-public bridge: real payment histories, real demographics, real default outcomes, SHA256-verified. It is not a production substitute: 2005 vintage, single geography, single product, no income/FOIR, random split, 30k rows, no reject inference complexity.
stronger_realism_lane_recommendation: Home Credit Default Risk (307k rows, multi-vintage, reject inference required, income fields, temporal split possible) as G10 BeastMax lane. LendingClub as T3 secondary. Taiwan remains as compact verified bridge.

product_thesis_clarity.rationale: Sharp identity; six sub-decisions governed; user personas documented; cost of wrongness quantified

market_jd_relevance.rationale: SR 26-2 alignment; PSI/ECE/champion-challenger/calibration all present. Missing: WOE/IV, FOIR on real income data, bureau feature engineering

technique_tournament_depth.rationale: XGBoost/LightGBM/LR/Platt/PSI/fairness built. Missing: WOE/IV, scorecard path, reject inference implementation, temporal validation, KS scalar, isotonic calibration

deep_defense_kernel.rationale: 20 defense cards covering calibration, thresholding, reject inference, PSI, champion/challenger, fairness boundaries. Hard questions with specific numerically-grounded answers.

product_reasoning_kernel.rationale: 14 product decisions with first-principles drivers. AUC vs calibration reasoning is production-grade. Cost-sensitive thresholding derivation is correct.

data_realism_feature_engineering.rationale: Taiwan Default: 2005 vintage, no income/FOIR, 30k rows, single product, random split, no reject inference complexity. Real and verified, but thin by production standards.

synthetic_realism_audit.rationale: Synthetic harness clearly demoted to STRESS-TEST-ONLY lane at G5.5. SYNTHETIC_HARNESS tags throughout. Claim boundary prevents synthetic results from leaking into credit risk performance claims.

evidence_honesty.rationale: 10 pre-launch gaps explicit. Forbidden claims documented throughout. Provenance challenged before G9. Launch status NOT_PRODUCTION_READY. No false confidence in illustrative cost matrix.

evaluation_validity.rationale: Correct Platt protocol (val for calibration, test for evaluation). But: random not temporal split; LightGBM comparison unfair (uncalibrated vs calibrated); 6k test set with ±1pp metric uncertainty; no bootstrap CI.

decision_economics.rationale: Cost matrix C_bad=10/C_reject=1 illustrative; ratio not grounded in observed charge-off/NIM data; no P&L validation on historical cohort; sensitivity sweep exists but cannot validate absolute threshold.

industry_pattern_awareness.rationale: Knows about reject inference, bureau features, FOIR, temporal validation, WOE/IV — all documented as gaps. Awareness without implementation. PSI segment-blindspot acknowledged. Delayed label pipeline documented.

hairy_failure_modes.rationale: 19 failure modes documented including: PSI segment blindspot, reject inference MNAR risk, temporal leakage, calibration population drift, operational review queue overflow, label delay in production, override audit trail gaps.

achievement_moments.rationale: 6 genuine moments: synthetic demotion, bridge data addition, calibration-first champion selection, G7 lane patch, provenance challenge pre-G9. All credible and specific.

tradeoff_density.rationale: AUC vs calibration; 3-zone vs single-threshold; bridge vs BeastMax; Platt vs isotonic; Bayes-optimal vs operational threshold — all documented with reasoning.

interview_dominance.rationale: Dominant on calibration, ECE, thresholding, champion/challenger governance. Weaker on reject inference (knows gap, cannot demonstrate implementation), bureau features, temporal validation, real economics.

primary_levers: data_realism_feature_engineering: 4→7 via Home Credit G10 (+3pts) — temporal split, reject inference, income features
evaluation_validity: 6→8 via calibrated LightGBM comparison + bootstrap CI at G9 (+2pts)
decision_economics: 4→6 via published benchmark cost ratios or lender partner data (+2pts)
industry_pattern_awareness: 6→7 via reject inference implementation at G10 (+1pt)
technique_tournament_depth: 6→7 via WOE/IV + KS scalar at G9 (+1pt)

top_15_claim_risks: Claiming Taiwan Default reflects current credit market conditions (2005 vintage; 19-year gap)
Claiming model generalises to populations outside Taiwan credit card holders (single geography, single product)
Citing synthetic AUC=0.6237 or synthetic ECE=0.00159 as credit risk performance metrics without SYNTHETIC_HARNESS qualifier
Citing LightGBM AUC=0.7742 as a fair comparison to XGBoost Platt champion (uncalibrated vs calibrated)
Claiming threshold θ=0.20 is well-grounded (cost matrix is illustrative; 10:1 ratio not observed from real lender economics)
Stating PulseGuard is SR 26-2 compliant or certified (aligned in methodology, not certified)
Claiming Taiwan Default is representative of Indian, US, or EU consumer lending populations
Implying the 10:1 cost ratio is a conservative industry default rather than an assumed illustration
Claiming fairness is certified or proven from DI/EOpp calculation on Taiwan test set
Presenting the REVIEW zone override policy as tested or operational (designed and documented only)
Claiming random stratified split produces the same confidence in out-of-time performance as temporal validation
Stating that ECE=0.0112 means the model is 'production-calibrated' (it is calibrated on this dataset/split, not in production)
Claiming provenance audit proves the dataset is free of selection or reporting bias (it only proves file identity and authenticity)
Asserting that PSI monitoring thresholds will catch all meaningful population drift (univariate blindspot acknowledged)
Claiming adverse action reason codes can be generated from SHAP values without a regulatory taxonomy (not yet mapped)

safe_claims_now: PulseGuard uses a verified real public credit-card default dataset (UCI Taiwan Default, SHA256-confirmed, 20/20 provenance checks) as its primary data lane
XGBoost with Platt calibration achieves ROC-AUC=0.7852, PR-AUC=0.5709, ECE=0.0112 on a stratified 6,000-row test split of Taiwan Default (real data)
Platt calibration reduces ECE by 94.6% (0.2082→0.0112) and is fit on held-out validation set, not test set
The 3-zone policy (APPROVE PD<0.20 / REVIEW 0.20–0.40 / REJECT PD≥0.40) produces observed default rates of 10.7%/27.2%/62.7% on the real Taiwan Default test set
Threshold θ*=C_reject/(C_bad+C_reject) is the Bayes-optimal formula under a 10:1 illustrative cost ratio; empirical minimum expected loss is confirmed at θ=0.10
Monitoring triggers are grounded in G6/G7 evidence: ECE WARN at 2.2× baseline (0.025), approve-zone DR WARN at 1.9× baseline (20%)
Launch status is NOT_PRODUCTION_READY; 10 pre-launch gaps explicitly documented
Taiwan Default is a verified real-public bridge, not the final BeastMax ceiling; Home Credit realism lane is scheduled for G10
PulseGuard governance is aligned with SR 26-2 model risk management methodology but is not certified or externally validated

The synthetic Home Credit-like lane is a stress-test harness only; synthetic results (AUC=0.6237, ECE=0.00159) demonstrate correct protocol functioning under known conditions, not credit risk performance

G9_completion: Disparate impact, equal opportunity, and PPV computed at G7 thresholds for SEX, EDUCATION, MARRIAGE on real Taiwan Default test set
Calibrated LightGBM vs calibrated XGBoost champion/challenger comparison completed; champion selection is fully justified
SHAP-based adverse action reason code assignment built; top adverse features documentable per application
KS statistic documented alongside ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, ECE, Brier; complete metric set on Taiwan Default
G10_completion: Model trained and validated on Home Credit Default Risk (307k rows, multi-vintage, real income fields)
Out-of-time validation completed; OOT AUC documented with temporal split
Reject inference study completed; selection bias in approved-applicant training formally addressed
WOE/IV feature encoding and integer scorecard built; regulatory-preferred interpretable model path demonstrated

next_gate_recommendation.rationale: G8.1 PASS unblocks G9. G9 delivers the highest-value evidence items that require no new data: Taiwan fairness audit at thresholds 0.20/0.40 for SEX/EDUCATION/MARRIAGE; calibrated LightGBM fair comparison; SHAP adverse reason code assignment. All four G9 deliverables close material claim gaps without requiring new data acquisition.

g9_shap_report.json — SHAP top-k adverse features per test instance

Open Home Credit pipeline before G9 evidence gates pass

blocked_until.claim: Fair-lending methodology demonstrated on large sample

resume_lines_safe_now: Built end-to-end credit risk governance platform (PulseGuard) covering model training, calibration, champion/challenger governance, cost-sensitive threshold policy, fairness audit harness, and monitoring design.

Trained XGBoost with Platt calibration on verified real public credit-card default data (UCI Taiwan Default, 30k rows, SHA256-verified); achieved ROC-AUC=0.7852, PR-AUC=0.5709, ECE=0.0112 post-calibration.
Implemented 3-zone APPROVE/REVIEW/REJECT policy using Bayes-optimal threshold derivation (θ*=C_reject/(C_bad+C_reject)) with observed zone default rates: 10.7%/27.2%/62.7%.
Calibration gate enforces Platt-first model promotion (ECE WARN=0.025, ALERT=0.05): prevents AUC-chasing and ensures threshold interpretability.
Designed PSI and ECE monitoring triggers grounded in G6/G7 evidence baselines, not copied from literature.
Governance dossier documents 10 explicit pre-launch gaps including adverse action, IMV, reject inference, and FOIR — launch status is NOT_PRODUCTION_READY.
Established claim boundary taxonomy (BUILT, SYNTHETIC HARNESS, BOUNDARY-LIMITED, BUILD-TASK, PLACEHOLDER) across all evidence artifacts.

Model achieves AUC 0.62 on credit risk [DELETE unless SYNTHETIC HARNESS qualifier is explicit — this is the synthetic result]
LightGBM challenger rejected in favor of XGBoost [DELETE — LightGBM is HELD pending calibrated rematch]
Fairness-certified model [DELETE — DI computation is not a fair-lending certification]

audit_integrity_note: This audit is deliberately critical. The goal is to distinguish between what is genuinely built and evidenced versus what is aspirational, documented-as-gap, or would collapse under interview scrutiny. PulseGuard's strengths are real; its gaps are real. Do not protect previous work by inflating scores. Do not reopen G9 without completing G9's four deliverables.
